title: Visualize Package Impact with New Features

topics.title: Package Dependency Visualization
topics.summary: The addition of a dependents/dependees list to package detail views on npmx.dev is proposed to enhance user experience. This feature will allow package maintainers and users to assess the impact of changes and the popularity of packages, similar to npmjs.com.

topics.title: Blog Setup for Announcements
topics.summary: A proposal to establish a blog for npmx.dev aims to facilitate announcements, such as the alpha launch. The blog would align with the website's style and include features like RSS and comments integration, enhancing community engagement and information dissemination.
